overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit futuristic city. The character navigates a covered sidewalk with tactile paving, passes various pedestrians with umbrellas, and crosses a busy intersection with police presence.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with tactile paving and glass canopy

events.description: police officer NPC walks past the camera from right to left, temporarily blocking view
large pedestrian with purple umbrella passes closely by the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk through the rain, observing the neon-lit surroundings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing samurai tank top carrying a glowing blue umbrella walking toward camera
large male pedestrian with purple umbrella and 'MILITECH' shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: arched glass and metal roof structure with illuminated edges covering the pedestrian walkway
orange textured safety strip running along the walkway edge with raised patterns
large floating digital advertisement displaying animated graphics and text
tall vertical digital screen showing anime-style character with green background
transparent safety barrier separating walkway from the street below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy futuristic city walkway covered by a glass canopy. The character walks forward along orange tactile paving, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas walking in the opposite direction. Neon holographic advertisements illuminate the foggy atmosphere while skyscrapers fade into the hazy background.

events.description: NCPD police car becomes visible ahead parked on the sidewalk
slow walking pace while approaching the police car and intersection corner

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway toward the police presence at the intersection

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked on the sidewalk with 'POLICE' markings and emergency lights
police officer in uniform standing beside the patrol car observing the street

entered.detail: white and teal police sedan with 'POLICE' and 'NCPD' markings, red and blue light bar
tall metal structure with multiple traffic signals and attached signage
dark green futuristic coupe with black wheels parked near the curb

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the covered walkway approaching an intersection where an NCPD police car is parked on the sidewalk. A police officer stands nearby as traffic moves along the adjacent road. The large anime billboard remains visible on the right while the character slows down approaching the corner.

events.description: turn right at the police car to face the crosswalk direction
exit the covered walkway and step onto the open intersection crosswalk

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection and crossing the street via the marked crosswalk

notable_agents.action: police officer standing next to green sports car, monitoring the intersection

entered.detail: pedestrian crossing marked with alternating yellow and black diagonal stripes
large metal framework spanning the intersection with traffic lights and signs
wide open space of the road intersection with multiple lanes visible

segments.scene_description: The character turns right at the police car and exits the covered walkway onto an open intersection crosswalk. The ground changes to yellow and black striped asphalt as the character crosses the wide road. Traffic moves through the intersection while the police car recedes into the background, and the expansive futuristic cityscape opens up ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit walkway into the open expanse of a rainy futuristic intersection. It begins under a glass canopy, moving forward along orange tactile paving past pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and holographic advertisements that pierce the foggy air. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward a street corner where an NCPD police car and officer are stationed beside a towering anime billboard. The camera then turns right, exiting the covered shelter and transitioning onto yellow and black striped asphalt. Finally, the view opens up across the wide road as the character crosses the intersection, leaving the police presence behind to reveal the full scale of the expansive cityscape.
